category_sources: Official ncbi/sra-tools README describes SRA Toolkit as tools and libraries for INSDC Sequence Read Archives.
source_facts.description says it provides data tools for the INSDC Sequence Read Archive.
display_name_sources: Official ncbi/sra-tools README uses the name SRA Toolkit.
docs_sources: NCBI SRA page lists SRA Toolkit Documentation under Tools and Software.
Official ncbi/sra-tools README points users to the project wiki for using, configuring, and building the toolkit.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/ncbi/sra-tools, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official ncbi/sra-tools README describes tools for SRA data access and use.
source_facts.description mentions INSDC Sequence Read Archive data tools.
source_facts.executables include fastq-dump, fasterq-dump, prefetch, sam-dump, and vdb utilities.
